title: asplenium obtusatum var. difforme
intro: Asplenium obtusatum var. difforme, also known as the broad-leaf spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Asplenium obtusatum var. difforme include its potential to support respiratory health, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. As for herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a tea or used in a tincture, with the dried leaves being used in infusions or decoctions.
